scripts.test:frontend-role-proof: npm run test:frontend-static-role-contract && npm run test:frontend-route-state-render && npm run test:frontend-dispatch-bridge && npm run test:frontend-hydrated-handlers && npm run test:frontend-hydrated-surfaces && npm run test:frontend-component-interactions && npm run test:frontend-no-bind-interactions && npm run test:frontend-static-focusability && npm run test:frontend-tablet-interaction && npm run test:frontend-route-live-contract && npm run test:frontend-host-confirmations && npm run test:frontend-keyboard-traversal && npm run test:frontend-iab-interaction-page && npm run test:frontend-iab-static-dom && npm run test:frontend-iab-fixture-smoke && npm run test:frontend-iab-localhost-fixture-smoke && npm run test:frontend-iab-fixture-handoff && npm run test:frontend-iab-imported-run && FMARCH_ALLOW_STATIC_ROLE_FALLBACK=1 npm run test:frontend-role-smoke && npm run test:frontend-role-smoke-import && npm run test:frontend-iab-fixture-bundle && npm run test:frontend-iab-fixture-bundle-import && npm run test:frontend-browser-acceptance-boundary && npm run test:frontend-completion-audit && npm run test:frontend-readiness-summary && npm run test:frontend-iab-operator-runbook && npm run test:frontend-iab-replay-help && npm run test:frontend-role-artifacts

scripts.test:frontend-contract: node --test tools/frontend_role_smoke_scenarios.test.mjs frontend/src/lib/app/*.test.mjs frontend/src/lib/components/admin/*.test.mjs frontend/src/lib/components/host-action/*.test.mjs frontend/src/lib/components/player-channel-rail/*.test.mjs frontend/src/lib/components/player-command/*.test.mjs frontend/src/lib/components/player-posture/*.test.mjs frontend/src/lib/components/player-private-queue/*.test.mjs frontend/src/lib/components/player-thread/*.test.mjs frontend/src/routes/*.test.mjs frontend/src/routes/admin/*.test.mjs frontend/src/routes/auth/login/*.test.mjs && node "frontend/src/routes/g/[game]/game-route-model.test.mjs" && node "frontend/src/routes/g/[game]/player-route-layout.test.mjs" && node "frontend/src/routes/g/[game]/player-route-controller.test.mjs" && node "frontend/src/routes/g/[game]/player-route-browser-bridge.test.mjs" && node "frontend/src/routes/g/[game]/c/[channel]/+page.test.mjs" && node "frontend/src/routes/g/[game]/host/host-route-model.test.mjs" && node "frontend/src/routes/g/[game]/host/host-route-controller.test.mjs" && node "frontend/src/routes/g/[game]/host/host-route-browser-bridge.test.mjs" && node "frontend/src/routes/media/live-stack/thread/[asset]/+server.test.mjs"
